SOURCE: 90867631.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (90867631.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT professional with over 20 years of service in the Army, including multiple deployments. Holds a Bachelor's Degree and Master's Degree in Computer Information Systems from Saint Leo University and Central Texas College respectively.
SKILLS: A+ Certified, Active Directory, Administrative Duties, Adobe, Dreamweaver, Army, Agency, Automation, Backup, Basic, C, CH, COM, Hardware Configuration, Computer Hardware, Configuration Management, Consulting, Contract Management, Copying, Client, Customer Service, Customer Support, Databases, Database, Decision Support Systems, Disaster Recovery, Email, Equipment Installation, XML, Fax Machines, Features, Functional, Help Desk, HTML, Information Security, Information Systems, Information Technology, Computer Support, IT Support, Local Area Network, Local Area Networks, LAN, Notebooks, Leadership, Logistics, Managing, Mercator, Microcomputers, Access, Microsoft Certified Professional, MCP, Microsoft Certified, Exchange, Microsoft Exchange, Mail, Office, Outlook, SharePoint, SharePoint, Windows 2000, Windows XP, Windows XP, Monitors, NEC, Network Administrator, Network, Networks, Novell, Oct, Operating Systems, Oracle, Organizational, Peripherals, Personnel, Copiers, Policies, PR, Printers, Processes, Programming, Project Management, Read, Repairs, Reporting, Safety, Scanners, Servers, Software Development, Software Troubleshooting, Spanish, Spreadsheet, SQL, Strategic, Supervisor, System Administrator, Systems Administration, Systems Analysis, Systems Development, Tables, Technical Support, Technical Assistance, User Manuals, Telecommunications, Telecommunication, Telephones, Phone, Troubleshoot, Troubleshooting, Unique, Upgrades, Video, Visio, Vista, Visual Basic, Wide Area Network (WAN), WAN, Workflow, Written

SOURCE: 90867631.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: First Division West
DATES: Jun 1986 - Aug 2008
DESCRIPTION: Served for 22 years with dedication, loyalty and selfless service to the nation. Awarded the Achievement Medal for outstanding civilian service during deployment in Afghanistan (Operation Enduring Freedom) and Iraq (Operation Iraqi Freedom).

SOURCE: 90867631.pdf
JOB TITLE: First Sergeant
COMPANY: 
DATES: Oct 2005 - Aug 2008
DESCRIPTION: Led a multifunctional unit with over 120 team members and billions of dollars worth of equipment into combat during Operation Enduring Freedom (Afghanistan) and Operation Iraqi Freedom (Iraq). Served as administrative liaison, coordinated operational and administrative duties, supervised operations and performance of Battalion Level Information Systems/Communication Shop (S-6), and served as a senior advisor to the Company commander.

SOURCE: 90867631.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: Oct 2008 - May 2015
DESCRIPTION: Managed video teleconference (VTC) suite for unclassified and classified access, managed unit's SharePoint site, controlled access, developed and established policies and accounts, trained users. Provided IT support to over 800 users.
